content:
<USER_REQUEST>
FIX BUGS 2, 3, 4, 5 — Exact changes only, no other modifications
Bug 2 — Waiting Bill click does nothing in Cashier bar mode
In CashierDashboard.jsx, find this line in the JSX table grid render:
javascript{tables.map((table, i) => {
Change to:
javascript{activeTables.map((table, i) => {
Then find every place inside billing alert handlers where a table is looked up — it will look like:
javascriptconst table = tables.find(t => t.backendId === tableId || t.id === tableId);
Change every such tables.find(...) inside billing/alert handlers to:
javascriptconst table = activeTables.find(t => t.backendId === tableId || t.id === tableId);

Bug 3 — Payment modal not showing for bar
In CashierDashboard.jsx, find:
javascriptconst dbTxns = await fetchTransactions(RESTAURANT_ID, 100, todayStr);
Change to:
javascriptconst dbTxns = await fetchTransactions(activeRestaurantId, 100, todayStr);
Add activeRestaurantId to the loadTransactions useCallback dependency array:
javascript}, [activeRestaurantId]);
<truncated 1788 bytes>
